text: Relevant functionality from @diegopetrucci/pi-extensions is localized under Lumio's extensions/ directory, and the package is not a Lumio runtime dependency. Lumio does not store an upstream source snapshot; npm run check monitors remote commits through GitHub compare and uses explicit upstream-to-local path mappings from upstreams.json. The upstream brrr extension is represented by Lumio's local bark implementation.
author: wicsp <wicspa@gmail.com>
